items.count: {count, plural, =0 {no items} one {# item} other {# items}}

empty.title: This folder is empty
empty.subtitle: No browsable items were found here.

viewer.downloadOnlyDescription: Inline preview is not available for this file type. Use the download button to save it to your computer.
viewer.downloadDisabledDescription: The administrator has not enabled downloads for this file.
viewer.docDescription: Preview is rendering below. For the full experience download the file.
viewer.docUnavailableDescription: This .doc file could not be converted (LibreOffice missing or conversion failed). Contact the administrator.
viewer.pdfFallbackTitle: Unable to render this PDF inline
viewer.pdfFallbackDescription: Your browser could not display the file. Use the download button to open it locally.

sidebar.aiSubtitle: Free local retrieval, no cloud calls.
sidebar.aiDescription: Search the full text of the library. Ctrl+K to focus.
sidebar.aiResultsHint: Top matches, click to open at the relevant page.
sidebar.aiIndexingNotice: AI index is still building. Try again later.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Maintain the library index and curate the homepage.

reindex.title: Reindex archive
reindex.description: Scan ARCHIVE_ROOT again and refresh the database. Safe to run anytime.

highlights.title: Homepage highlights
highlights.description: Toggle which documents appear as introductory cards on the homepage.
highlights.emptyHint: No items yet. Run the indexer to populate the library.

explorer.title: Archive explorer
explorer.description: Upload, move, delete, and toggle downloadability. Click a folder to enter it.
explorer.selectedCount: {count, plural, =0 {nothing selected} one {# item selected} other {# items selected}}
explorer.uploadDropHint: Drag files here or click to choose
explorer.deletePrompt: Delete {count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}? This cannot be undone.

ai.title: AI index
ai.description: Rebuild the semantic index for PDF, DOC and DOCX files. Uses local free models only.
